commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6f85023b21dfdb9deaf051a4dce9c2255b9eba27)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `highlight.js` as a direct Control UI dependency and updates the markdown renderer, tests, and component styles to emit syntax-highlighted WebChat code blocks.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows the PR emits `hljs` on `<code>` inside `.code-block-wrapper`, while the added selectors require a `.code-block` ancestor. I did not run a browser because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: The external PR needs a contributor-side selector fix plus real WebChat proof before merge; this review should not queue a ClawSweeper repair lane.

target.title: ui: highlight WebChat code blocks
target.body:
Fixes #10029.

## Summary
- Add `highlight.js` to the Control UI markdown renderer using the core highlighter plus a bounded set of common chat/code languages.
- Highlight explicit fenced languages and high-confidence unlabeled code blocks while preserving copy buttons, language labels, JSON collapse, markdown caching, and HTML escaping.
- Add theme-aware token styles and regression tests for highlighted JS, collapsed JSON, unlabeled C++, and escaped HTML code.

## Verification
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=60000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui.config.ts ui/src/ui/markdown.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/tsgo --noEmit --project test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.ui.json`
- `COREPACK_HOME=/private/tmp/corepack /usr/local/bin/corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/ui/markdown.ts ui/src/ui/markdown.test.ts ui/src/types/highlight-js-subpaths.d.ts ui/src/styles/components.css`
- `../node_modules/.bin/vite build` from `ui/`
- `COREPACK_HOME=/private/tmp/corepack /usr/local/bin/corepack pnpm build`
- `git diff --check -- ui/src/ui/markdown.ts ui/src/ui/markdown.test.ts ui/src/types/highlight-js-subpaths.d.ts ui/src/styles/components.css ui/package.json pnpm-lock.yaml`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: WebChat markdown code blocks now render syntax-highlight token markup for explicit languages and confident auto-detected unlabeled blocks, while existing code-block chrome still exposes the original text for copy actions.

Real environment tested: macOS local OpenClaw checkout on Node v24.13.1, branch `fix/webchat-code-syntax-highlighting`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran the focused markdown renderer tests, UI TypeScript test config typecheck, oxfmt check, direct Control UI Vite production build, full `pnpm build`, and whitespace diff check listed above.

Evidence after fix: `ui/src/ui/markdown.test.ts` passed with 68 tests, including assertions for JS token spans, JSON collapse highlighting, confident unlabeled C++ highlighting, preserved copy `data-code`, localized copy labels, and escaped HTML code. The Control UI production build completed successfully, and the full repository build completed successfully.

Observed result after fix: Markdown code blocks keep their existing wrapper, copy button, language label, and JSON collapse behavior, but code content now includes sanitized `hljs-*` token spans that can be styled in dark and light themes.

What was not tested: I did not attach a live WebChat browser screenshot. `codex review --uncommitted` was attempted, but the local Codex CLI could not complete because its model request failed in this environment with network/certificate errors.

## AI assistance
AI-assisted with Codex. I reviewed the implementation and understand the code path and validation above.
target.author: zhengzuo0-ai
